## Checklist

Before submitting, please verify:

- [ ] Agent-specific formats are behind an adapter boundary
- [ ] Reducer or protocol tests added for every new event path
- [ ] Asset provenance included for any art, sound, or type changes
- [ ] `make test` passes with a matching Swift and macOS SDK
- [ ] Every changed control tested with keyboard and pointer input
- [ ] Checked with Reduce Motion, Increase Contrast, and a non-notched display
- [ ] No API keys, prompts, transcripts, terminal history, or signed license data included
